raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the thesis, gap, and contribution framing are clear and appropriately pitched.","R1.2":"The reviewer is expected to assess whether the argument moves coherently from benchmark limitations to the proposed evaluator and conclusions.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical performance claims, so review should check whether those claims follow from the reported evaluation results.","R1.6":"A generic section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough context to verify technical or empirical claims.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims about replacing default evaluation protocols, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The response must remain within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or expanding the paper.","RX.4":"Because evaluation protocols can affect downstream benchmark conclusions, the review should avoid endorsing unsupported or harmful uses.","RX.5":"Any review observations should be traceable to specific claims or wording in the provided section."}}

rationale.R1.1: A section review centrally includes checking whether the thesis, gap, and contribution framing are clear and appropriately pitched.
rationale.R1.2: The reviewer is expected to assess whether the argument moves coherently from benchmark limitations to the proposed evaluator and conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical performance claims, so review should check whether those claims follow from the reported evaluation results.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough context to verify technical or empirical claims.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims about replacing default evaluation protocols, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or expanding the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Because evaluation protocols can affect downstream benchmark conclusions, the review should avoid endorsing unsupported or harmful uses.
rationale.RX.5: Any review observations should be traceable to specific claims or wording in the provided section.
